_comment: Fixed eval set - 20 items. e1-e5 hand-written; e6-e20 DRAFTED from chunks and pending human review: verify each page actually answers the question, and reword ~6 into your own phrasing so recall isn't flattered by slide wording. Retrieval is correct if a top-k chunk comes from ANY listed (source_file, page) pair.

items.question: What is the formula for propagation delay?
What is the formula for transmission delay?
What does delivery mean as a criterion for effective data communication?
When does transmission time dominate over propagation time?
What is the difference between data and communication?
What characteristics of a network system must be evaluated to determine its overall performance?
How are the main categories of transmission impairments caused by a bad  medium?
what are the differences between single-mode fiber and multimode fiber?
Why is the term bandwidth used differently in networking contexts compared to its use in signal analysis?
What is the relationship between the number of bits per symbol level and the number of discrete signal levels available?
How does the bandwidth-delay product provide a useful analogy for understanding link capacity?
how does sheilded twisted pair differ from unsheilded pair
Why does increasing the number of signal levels in a modulation scheme reduce the reliability of a transmission system?
What is the purpose of adding redundant bits to data in error detection and correction?
How is attenuation in a transmission medium measured and what is its unit?
What conditions must be met for a code to reliably detect all occurrences of up to s errors?
How does modulo-2 arithmetic differ from standard decimal arithmetic, and what is its role in coding theory?
What are the key characteristics that distinguish the two approaches to handling detected errors in transmission?
How does the Hamming distance metric help determine the error detection capability of a coding scheme?
What are the practical limitations of wireless media communication compared to guided transmission channels?
